##NAMES=Ferrokesterite

##LOCALITY=Cligga mine, Perranzabuloe, Cornwall, England
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Dark greenish black semimetallic massive. The X-ray diffraction results indicate a exsolution texture of ferrokesterite and stannite. According to Kissin & Owens (1989), based on our cell edges, this sample is at the stannite/ferrokesterite boundary.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
